narrative:
Harrison Twp township has 6,407 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
